title: Conflict Signature
promise: What do you do when disagreement becomes real? Map your signature across five conflict approaches — confront, negotiate, accommodate, avoid, transform.
description: 8 forced-choice scenarios. Mark first and second instinct (first = 3 points, second = 1). Result maps your primary and secondary conflict approaches, where each fits, and what to watch. Challenge a friend to compare signatures.
ogDescription: What is your conflict reflex? 8 scenarios, ~3 min. Private by design.
